sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98978" key="sumfw/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμφών-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n98978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">agreement</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg008.perseus-grc1:6:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.15</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n98978.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συνίζησις</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.326</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
